## Checklist

- [ ] Entry uses the format: `- Title (**Venue Year**). \[[paper](url)\]\[[code](url)\]` + a one-line `> note`
- [ ] Added to the correct numbered section, in rough importance/chronological order
- [ ] Mirrored in **both** [`README.md`](../README.md) and [`README.zh-CN.md`](../README.zh-CN.md)
- [ ] All new links resolve (paper / code / data)
- [ ] `🧠` used only for genuinely seminal / must-read works (if applicable)

See [CONTRIBUTING.md](../CONTRIBUTING.md) for details.
